allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/search/repositories?q=neuraroute" -Headers @{ 'User-Agent'='claude-code' } -ErrorAction Stop; $r.items | Select-Object full_name, html_url, description, pushed_at, language | Format-List } catch { Write-Output "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
